scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev -w @trustlayer/api" "npm run dev -w @trustlayer/web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @trustlayer/shared && npm run build -w @trustlayer/reputation-engine
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trustlayer/shared && npm run build -w @trustlayer/reputation-engine && npm run build -w @trustlayer/api && npm run build -w @trustlayer/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run db:generate -w @trustlayer/api && npm run build -w @trustlayer/api
